data.title: Cboe BZX Proposes Rule Change for Invesco Galaxy's Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs
data.description:
According to PANews, Cboe BZX Exchange has submitted a proposed rule change to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on behalf of Invesco Galaxy. The proposal aims to allow physical creation and redemption of shares for its spot Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs. This method enables direct exchange of the ETFs' underlying assets, Bitcoin or Ethereum, with ETF shares, bypassing the need for cash transactions. This approach eliminates the necessity for participants to sell the underlying cryptocurrency to create shares, reducing bid-ask spreads and avoiding additional brokerage fees.

As the SEC reviews Cboe's proposed rule change, a public comment period has been initiated, allowing stakeholders to share their opinions before a final decision is made. The document states that authorized participants, institutions involved in the creation and redemption process, will be eligible to use the physical trading model. However, individual investors will still need to use a cash-based model when purchasing or redeeming ETF shares.

data.title: Cboe Applies to SEC for Physical Redemption of Invesco Galaxy Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Cboe BZX Exchange has submitted a rule change application to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), intending to allow the Invesco Galaxy Spot Bitcoin ETF and Ethereum ETF to be physically created and redeemed.
This mechanism allows authorized participants to directly use Bitcoin or Ethereum to exchange ETF shares instead of cash transactions, thereby reducing bid-ask spreads, reducing transaction costs, and avoiding additional brokerage commissions. However, ordinary investors still need to trade ETFs in cash mode.
Currently, the SEC has opened a public comment period, and relevant stakeholders can submit feedback before the final decision. (Decrypt)

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 1,900 USDT with a 0.03% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 13, 2025, 10:51 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 1,900 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 1,900.119995 USDT, with a narrowed 0.03% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Barclays: The Fed is expected to cut interest rates by 25 basis points in June and September
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Barclays' latest forecast shows that the Federal Reserve may cut interest rates by 25 basis points in June and September this year, which is an adjustment compared to the previous forecast that only one rate cut was expected in June. This change may reflect the market's further consideration of inflation and slowing economic growth. (Jinshi)

data.title: Barclays Predicts Federal Reserve Rate Cuts in June and September
data.description: According to PANews, Barclays has revised its forecast for the Federal Reserve's interest rate policy, now anticipating two rate cuts of 25 basis points each in June and September of this year. Previously, the bank had predicted a single rate cut in June.

data.title: Hyperliquid 50x leverage whale opens orders on two platforms, with a total position size of nearly US$70 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, Hyperliquid 50x leveraged whale has recently adjusted its positions and deployed on both Hyperliquid and GMX platforms. The current total position size is close to 70 million US dollars: 
Hyperliquid: Adopting ETH/BTC exchange rate trading strategy, the overall position is about 30 million US dollars, including 25x ETH long orders and 40x BTC short orders. Its estimated ETH/BTC opening rate is 0.02269, while the current exchange rate is 0.02284, with a slight floating profit. 
GMX: unilateral 26.21x long ETH, holdings of 38.7 million US dollars, and current floating profits of about 90,000 US dollars. 
At present, the whale's strategy is still in operation, but its high leverage operation is extremely risky, and the market may change unfavorably at any time. Investors please pay attention and avoid blindly following orders.

data.title: Trump on D.O.G.E firings: “I feel bad, but they weren’t working at all’
data.description:
President Donald Trump on Wednesday addressed the thousands of federal employees losing their jobs, saying he felt “very badly” for them but insisting many “don’t work at all.” Speaking at an Oval Office meeting with Irish Prime Minister Micheál Martin, he responded to questions about whether he felt responsible for the mass firings. “Sure I […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-on-d-o-g-e-firings-i-feel-bad/

data.title: Hyperliquid 50x leverage whale closed short orders and opened all ETH long orders, with a total position of nearly 55 million US dollars and a liquidation price of 1840 US dollars
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, the whales who had previously opened large ETH short orders in Hyperliquid and GMX quickly closed their positions in a short period of time and went long.
Latest data:
GMX: 16.99 times ETH long orders, holdings of 38.7 million US dollars.
Hyperliquid: 25 times ETH long orders, holdings of 16173.77 ETH (worth about 30.36 million US dollars), opening price of 1886 US dollars, liquidation price of 1840 US dollars.

data.title: Telegram Enhances Crypto Wallet With Trading And Earnings Features
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Telegram has introduced trading and earnings functionalities to its self-custody crypto wallet. This update allows users to buy, sell, or hold cryptocurrencies without needing on-chain deposits, aiming to attract new users.

data.title: Hyperliquid 50x leverage whale switched to GMX, opened a short position of 45.17 million USD ETH, and the liquidation price was 1982 USD
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, the 50x leveraged whale that had previously made a profit on Hyperliquid has moved to GMX and opened a large ETH short order.
Monitoring data shows that the whale recharged 4.09 million USDC to GMX as margin 10 minutes ago, and then opened ETH short orders with 17.6x and 18.06x leverage respectively, with a total position size of 45.17 million US dollars, an opening price of 1,885 US dollars, and a liquidation price of 1,982 US dollars.
